question: For the quarterly online platform data, what can be concluded about 'Online Searches' from this 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% per quarter. It can show the share of online searches, but it does not reveal their absolute trend over the year.
options.B: Online searches clearly decrease in absolute number every quarter.
options.C: Online searches clearly increase in absolute number every quarter.
options.D: Online searches have exactly the same absolute number in every quarter.

explanation: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. It can suggest that the share of a metric is higher in later quarters, but it cannot establish an absolute increasing trend without the underlying totals. A higher percentage share does not necessarily mean a higher absolute quantity.
